text: - d. Owner's  Insurance  Obligations. Owner  assumes  no  obligation  to  provide insurance other than that specified in this Exhibit.  Owner shall pay the costs of premiums for the OCIP Policies and will receive or pay all adjustments to such costs.    Except  as  provided  by  applicable  law,  Owner's  furnishing  of  the OCIP Policies shall in no way relieve or limit any Enrolled Party or Excluded Party of any responsibility, liability, or obligation imposed by the Contract Documents, the OCIP  Policies,  or  by  law,  including  without  limitation  any  indemnification obligations.
